name: ABM 100% Whole Wheat Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Vital Gluten or Gluten Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the yeast and dry ingredients.
2. Gradually add the liquid to the mixture until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a pan for baking on a regular bake cycle.
4. Alternatively, the bread can be baked on a rapid cycle.
